posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇪🇨 Threat Actor Claims Breach of Ecuadorian Mobility Platform Clipp A threat actor is advertising what they claim is a full compromise of Clipp (http://clipp.app / http://kradac.com), an Ecuador-based mobility and digital transportation platform operating across several Latin American countries. According to the post, the actor claims to possess: * Approximately 19 GB of stolen data * More than 100 databases * Around 5 million records * Customer usernames and passwords * Proprietary source code * Internal documents and PDF/TXT files * Access to development services and cloud management consoles * Payment-related information * Persistent access to the environment via a reverse shell The post also includes screenshots that allegedly demonstrate access to internal administrative systems. At the time of writing, there is no independent verification that Clipp or http://kradac.com has been compromised or that the advertised data is authentic. Analyst Note: If substantiated, the combination of customer data, source code, cloud infrastructure access, and persistent remote access would represent a severe breach with the potential to impact both customer information and the organization's software supply chain. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Ecuador
posts.text_zh: 🇪🇨 威脅行為者聲稱破壞了厄瓜多爾行動平台 Clipp 威脅行為者正在宣傳他們聲稱完全入侵 Clipp (http://clipp.app / http://kradac.com) 的內容，這是一個在多個拉丁美洲國家運營的厄瓜多爾行動和數位交通平台。根據該帖子，該攻擊者聲稱擁有： * 大約 19 GB 的被盜數據 * 超過 100 個資料庫 * 大約 500 萬條記錄 * 客戶用戶名和密碼 * 專有源代碼 * 內部文檔和 PDF/TXT 文件 * 訪問開發服務和雲管理控制台 * 支付相關信息 * 通過 shell 屏幕訪問 shell 權限對環境的持久性的持久訪問系統顯示系統顯示的信息截至撰寫本文時，尚無獨立證據表明 Clipp 或 http://kradac.com 已洩露或廣告資料的真實性。分析師註釋：如果得到證實，客戶資料、原始程式碼、雲端基礎設施存取和持久遠端存取的組合將構成嚴重違規，有可能影響客戶資訊和組織的軟體供應鏈。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Ecuador

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇩🇪 Alleged WordPress Database for German Automotive Platform Advertised A threat actor is advertising what they claim is a WordPress database associated with http://motoport-haendler.de, a Germany-based motorcycle dealer platform. According to the forum post: * A WordPress database is being offered for download. * Sample records appear to include user IDs, usernames, email addresses, first and last names, IP addresses, account status, and related metadata. * The actor provides sample database entries to support the claim. At the time of writing, there is no independent verification that the database is authentic or that http://motoport-haendler.de has been compromised. Analyst Note: If legitimate, the exposure of a WordPress user database could facilitate phishing, credential stuffing attacks, and account takeover attempts, particularly where passwords have been reused across multiple services. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Germany
posts.text_zh: 🇩🇪 宣傳德國汽車平台的 WordPress 資料庫 威脅行為者正在宣傳他們聲稱與德國摩托車經銷商平台 http://motoport-haendler.de 相關的 WordPress 資料庫。根據論壇貼文： * WordPress 資料庫可供下載。 * 範例記錄似乎包括使用者 ID、使用者名稱、電子郵件地址、名字和姓氏、IP 位址、帳戶狀態和相關元資料。 * 參與者提供了範例資料庫條目來支援該聲明。截至撰寫本文時，尚無獨立驗證資料庫的真實性或 http://motoport-haendler.de 已洩露。分析師註釋：如果合法，WordPress 使用者資料庫的暴露可能會促進網路釣魚、撞庫攻擊和帳戶接管嘗試，特別是在多個服務中重複使用密碼的情況下。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Germany

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇫🇷 French Social Centers Federation Platform Allegedly Compromised A threat actor claims to have compromised Rezofed, the internal IT platform of the Fédération des Centres Sociaux et Socioculturels de France (FCSF), and is threatening to release source code, databases, and configuration files. According to the post, the actor claims: * The compromise affected Rezofed (http://rezofed.centres-sociaux.fr) * An Apache webshell was allegedly used to gain access * 29 database tables were exported to CSV * The attacker claims to have obtained full read/write access to the platform * Source code, databases, and configuration files were allegedly exfiltrated * The actor also claims to have deleted data from the server and is demanding the organization make contact At the time of writing, there is no independent verification that the claims are authentic or that the platform has been compromised. Analyst Note: If confirmed, a compromise of an internal platform with administrative privileges could expose sensitive organizational data, disrupt operations, and require credential rotation, forensic investigation, and integrity validation across affected systems. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #France
posts.text_zh: 🇫🇷 法國社會中心聯合會平台據稱遭到入侵 一名威脅行為者聲稱已經入侵了法國社會文化中心聯合會 (FCSF) 的內部 IT 平台 Rezofed，並威脅要發布源代碼、數據庫和配置文件。根據該帖子，該攻擊者聲稱： * 受影響的 Rezofed (http://rezofed.centres-sociaux.fr) * 據稱使用 Apache Webshell 來獲取訪問權限 * 29 個資料庫表被導出為 CSV * 攻擊者聲稱已獲得對該平台的完全讀取/寫入訪問權限 * 源代碼、資料庫和配置文件已被報告截至撰寫本文時，沒有獨立的驗證表明聲明是真實的或平台已被破壞。分析師註釋：如果得到證實，具有管理權限的內部平台受到損害可能會暴露敏感的組織資料、擾亂運營，並需要在受影響的系統中進行憑證輪調、取證調查和完整性驗證。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #France

posts.name: MonThreat
posts.text: ⚠️ Alleged TotalEnergies Customer Database Leak on Darkweb Forum A post on the Darkforums underground community claims to offer a database containing personal and account details of 20 million TotalEnergies customers for sale. The actor, operating under the handle @MrL33tH4, alleges that the dataset includes full information for residential clients in France. According to the listing, the database is priced at 650 euros. The seller provides a sample of the data structure, which reportedly contains the following fields: * Civilité (Title) * Nom (Last Name) * Prénom (First Name) * Téléphone (Phone Number) * Identifiant du point (Point Identifier) * fournisseur (Supplier) * Catégorie client (Client Category) * adresse (Address) * Code postal (Postal Code) * Commune (City/Municipality) * Formule tarifaire (Tariff Formula) * Calendrier Fournisseur (Supplier Calendar) * Puissance souscrite demandée (Subscribed Power Requested) * country The sample entries shown in the thread display French residential addresses, phone numbers, and specific energy consumption details, such as "Tarif BT <= 36kVA" and subscribed power levels like "6 kVA" or "9 kVA". The actor claims the source website is http://totalenergies.fr. TotalEnergies is a major multinational energy company headquartered in France, serving millions of customers globally. If authentic, the exposure of such detailed customer records including names, addresses, and phone numbers could facilitate targeted phishing campaigns, social engineering attacks, or identity theft against French residents. At the time of reporting, the alleged breach has not been independently verified by TotalEnergies or security researchers.
posts.text_zh: ⚠️ Darkweb 論壇上涉嫌 TotalEnergies 客戶資料庫洩露 Darkforums 地下社群上的一篇貼文聲稱提供一個包含 2000 萬 TotalEnergies 客戶個人和帳戶詳細資訊的資料庫可供出售。該攻擊者以 @MrL33tH4 為名進行操作，聲稱該資料集包含法國住宅客戶的完整資訊。根據清單，該資料庫售價為650歐元。賣家提供了資料結構樣本，據報導其中包含以下欄位： * Civilité（頭銜） * Nom（姓氏） * Prénom（名字） * Téléphone（電話號碼） * Identifiant du point（點識別碼） * fournisseur（供應商） * Catégorie client（客戶類別） Formula tarifaire（關稅公式）* Calendrier Fournisseur（供應商日曆）* Puissance souscritedemandée（請求的訂閱功率）*國家/地區線程中顯示的示例條目顯示法國住宅地址、電話號碼和特定能源消耗詳細信息，例如“Tarif BT <= 36kVA”和訂閱功率級別，例如“96 kVA”。該演員聲稱來源網站是 http://totalenergies.fr。 TotalEnergies 是一家總部位於法國的大型跨國能源公司，為全球數百萬客戶提供服務。如果真實，暴露此類詳細的客戶記錄（包括姓名、地址和電話號碼）可能會促進針對法國居民的有針對性的網路釣魚活動、社會工程攻擊或身分盜竊。截至本報告發布之時，TotalEnergies 或安全研究人員尚未對所指控的違規行為進行獨立核實。

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🚨 Threat Actor Claims Breach of Abbott Through Third-Party Lab Portal A threat actor calling itself "ShadowByt3S" claims to have compromised Abbott through a LabCentral portal and is threatening to publish allegedly stolen data unless the company responds within 48 hours. According to the post, the actor claims to have exfiltrated approximately 690 MB of data, including: * CE certificates and manufacturing compliance documents * Laboratory automation operation manuals * Technical specifications and product documentation * Regulatory and reference materials * Standard operating procedures (SOPs) and troubleshooting guides * Product requirement documentation reportedly obtained via API access The threat actor also claims to possess supporting evidence, including emails, screenshots, and file listings. At the time of writing, there is no independent verification that Abbott or the referenced third-party portal was compromised. Analyst Note: While the claimed dataset appears to consist primarily of technical and regulatory documentation rather than customer information, unauthorized access to internal product documentation and operational materials could present intellectual property, supply chain, and security risks if the claims are substantiated. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Healthcare
posts.text_zh: 🚨 威脅行為者聲稱透過第三方實驗室入口網站破壞了 Abbott 一名自稱「ShadowByt3S」的威脅行為者聲稱透過 LabCentral 入口網站危害了 Abbott，並威脅要發布涉嫌被盜的數據，除非該公司在 48 小時內做出回應。根據該帖子，該攻擊者聲稱已洩露了約 690 MB 的數據，包括： * CE 證書和製造合規文件 * 實驗室自動化操作手冊 * 技術規格和產品文檔 * 監管和參考材料 * 標準操作程序 (SOP) 和故障排除指南 * 據報道通過 API 訪問獲得的產品要求文檔列表威脅攻擊者還聲稱擁有屏幕支持證據。截至撰寫本文時，尚無獨立證據表明 Abbott 或引用的第三方入口網站已受到損害。分析師註釋：雖然所聲稱的數據集似乎主要由技術和監管文件組成，而不是客戶信息，但如果索賠得到證實，未經授權訪問內部產品文檔和操作材料可能會帶來知識產權、供應鍊和安全風險。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Healthcare

posts.name: MonThreat
posts.text: 🚨 Threat Actor Claims 40,000 Askari Bank Records Leaked on Darkweb A darkweb forum post claims that a database containing approximately 40,000 records from Askari Bank, one of Pakistan’s largest financial institutions, has been compromised and is available for sale. The actor alleges that the leak includes sensitive customer data such as national identification numbers (CNIC), full names, residential addresses, account numbers, and contact details. According to the listing, the exposed data fields include: * Bank name and branch name * CNIC / National ID * Customer Name * Address * Account number * Contact Number * Account Type (e.g., Saving A/C, Current A/C) The post provides sample entries showing customers from branches in Rawalpindi and Karachi, including specific street addresses and phone numbers. Askari Bank is a major player in Pakistan’s banking sector, with a significant retail and corporate customer base. If authentic, the exposure of CNICs alongside account numbers could facilitate targeted phishing campaigns, identity theft, and social engineering attacks against the bank's customers. At the time of reporting, the alleged breach has not been independently verified by Askari Bank or third-party security researchers.
posts.text_zh: 🚨 威脅行為者聲稱 40,000 條阿斯卡里銀行記錄在暗網上洩露 一篇暗網論壇帖子聲稱，包含巴基斯坦最大金融機構之一阿斯卡里銀行約 40,000 條記錄的數據庫已被洩露並可供出售。該行為者聲稱，洩露的內容包括敏感的客戶數據，例如國民身分證號碼 (CNIC)、全名、​​居住地址、帳號和聯絡資訊。根據清單，暴露的資料欄位包括： * 銀行名稱和分行名稱 * CNIC / 國民身分證 * 客戶姓名 * 地址 * 帳號 * 聯絡電話 * 帳戶類型（例如，儲蓄帳戶、目前帳戶） 該貼文提供了顯示來自拉瓦爾品第和卡拉奇分行的客戶的樣本條目，包括具體的街道地址和電話號碼。阿斯卡里銀行是巴基斯坦銀行業的主要參與者，擁有龐大的零售和企業客戶群。如果真實，CNIC 與帳號一起暴露可能會促進針對銀行客戶的有針對性的網路釣魚活動、身分盜竊和社會工程攻擊。截至本報告發布之時，Askari Bank 或第三方安全研究人員尚未對涉嫌違規行為進行獨立核實。

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: Dutch authorities dismantle alleged €100-million-per-month investment fraud operation Dutch police announced arrests connected to an international investment-fraud organization allegedly operating approximately 20 call centers with more than 700 fake financial advisers. Authorities estimate the organization may at one point have generated over €100 million per month, targeting tens of thousands of victims through fraudulent investment platforms and cryptocurrency payments. #DDW #Intelligence #TheNetherlands
posts.text_zh: 荷蘭當局搗毀涉嫌每月 1 億歐元的投資詐欺行動 荷蘭警方宣布逮捕與一個國際投資詐欺組織有關的人，該組織涉嫌經營約 20 個呼叫中心，並擁有 700 多名假財務顧問。當局估計該組織每月可能獲利超過 1 億歐元，透過欺詐性投資平台和加密貨幣支付瞄準數萬名受害者。 #DDW #Intelligence #TheNetherlands

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇹🇭 Alleged Backup & Configuration Archive for 1,500+ Thai Government and School Websites Advertised A threat actor is advertising what they claim is a large archive containing backups and configuration files associated with http://thai.ac, a platform used by schools, municipalities, and local government organizations in Thailand. According to the post, the archive allegedly contains: * 907 MB of SQL databases, configuration files, and backups * Data related to 1,500+ websites * Names, phone numbers, email addresses, physical addresses, and password hashes * Website configuration files and database credentials * Claimed write access capable of modifying or defacing 1,500+ connected websites At the time of writing, these claims have not been independently verified. Analyst Note: If authentic, this would represent a significant supply chain-style compromise. Access to shared configuration files and administrative credentials could enable widespread website defacement, credential theft, lateral movement, and unauthorized access across numerous educational and local government portals. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Thailand
posts.text_zh: 🇹🇭 涉嫌宣傳 1,500 多個泰國政府和學校網站的備份和配置存檔 威脅行為者正在宣傳他們聲稱的大型檔案，其中包含與 http://thai.ac 相關的備份和配置文件，http://thai.ac 是泰國學校、市政府和地方政府組織使用的平台。根據該帖子，該檔案據稱包含： * 907 MB 的 SQL 資料庫、設定檔和備份 * 與 1,500 多個網站相關的資料 * 姓名、電話號碼、電子郵件地址、實體地址和密碼雜湊 * 網站設定檔和資料庫憑證 * 聲稱能夠修改或破壞 1,500 多個連接網站的寫入聲明 截至撰寫本文時，這些聲明授權尚未得到獨立驗證。分析師註：如果屬實，這將代表著重大的供應鍊式妥協。對共享個人資料和管理憑證的存取可能會導致廣泛的網站篡改、憑證盜竊、橫向移動以及跨眾多教育和地方政府門戶的未經授權的存取。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Thailand

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇩🇪 Alleged German Database Advertised on Hacking Forum A threat actor is advertising what they claim is a database associated with http://rangee.com, a Germany-based IT and digital workplace solutions provider. According to the forum post: * The database is being offered for download. * Sample data appears to contain numerous email addresses associated with German organizations. * The actor claims email data is included, although the total number of records and full dataset contents were not disclosed. At the time of writing, there is no independent verification that the database is authentic or that http://rangee.com was compromised. Analyst Note: Even limited corporate email datasets can be leveraged for phishing, credential stuffing, business email compromise (BEC), and targeted social engineering campaigns if the claims prove to be legitimate. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Germany
posts.text_zh: 🇩🇪 駭客論壇上宣傳的所謂德國資料庫 威脅行為者正在宣傳他們聲稱與 http://rangee.com（一家位於德國的 IT 和數位工作場所解決方案提供商）相關的資料庫。根據論壇貼文： * 資料庫可供下載。 * 範例資料似乎包含許多與德國組織相關的電子郵件地址。 * 攻擊者聲稱其中包含電子郵件數據，但未透露記錄總數和完整數據集內容。截至撰寫本文時，尚無獨立驗證資料庫的真實性或 http://rangee.com 已洩露。分析師註釋：如果聲明被證明是合法的，即使有限的企業電子郵件資料集也可以用於網路釣魚、撞庫、商業電子郵件外洩 (BEC) 和有針對性的社會工程活動。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Germany

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇲🇽 Alleged Mexico Government Database Leak Advertised on Hacking Forum A threat actor is advertising what they claim is a database containing more than 150,000 records from "Declara Chiapas," an online declaration platform associated with the Mexican state of Chiapas. According to the post, the dataset allegedly includes: * 150,000+ records in CSV format * Full names * CURP (Mexican national identity number) * Email addresses * Phone numbers At the time of writing, there is no independent verification that the data is authentic or was obtained through a compromise. Analyst Note: If confirmed, the exposure of CURP identifiers alongside contact information could significantly increase the risk of identity theft, phishing, and targeted social engineering attacks against affected individuals. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Mexico
posts.text_zh: 🇲🇽 駭客論壇上宣傳墨西哥政府資料庫洩露 一名威脅行為者正在宣傳他們聲稱的資料庫，其中包含來自「Declara Chiapas」（與墨西哥恰帕斯州相關的線上申報平台）的 150,000 多筆記錄。根據該帖子，該資料集據稱包括： * 150,000 多條 CSV 格式的記錄 * 全名 * CURP（墨西哥國民身分證號碼） * 電子郵件地址 * 電話號碼 截至撰寫本文時，沒有獨立驗證資料的真實性或透過妥協獲得。分析師註釋：如果得到證實，CURP 識別碼和聯絡資訊的暴露可能會顯著增加針對受影響個人的身份盜竊、網路釣魚和有針對性的社會工程攻擊的風險。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Mexico

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🚨 Doxing Campaign Targeting an Individual Shared on Hacking Forum A threat actor has published a thread on a hacking forum claiming to expose the personal information of an individual allegedly involved in online abuse and extortion. According to the post: * The thread contains alleged personally identifiable information (PII), including the individual's name, age, nationality, phone number, and telecom details. * The actor accuses the individual of targeting minors, extortion, and harassment, though these allegations have not been independently verified. * The post encourages others to harass the individual and promises to continue publishing additional personal information. Analyst Note: Regardless of the allegations, publishing personal information and encouraging harassment significantly increases the risk of vigilantism, swatting, and other real-world harm. Claims made in these posts should be treated as unverified until confirmed by law enforcement or other credible sources. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb
posts.text_zh: 🚨 針對黑客論壇上分享的個人的人肉搜索活動 一名威脅行為者在黑客論壇上發布了一條帖子，聲稱要公開涉嫌參與在線濫用和勒索的個人的個人信息。根據該貼文： * 該貼文包含所謂的個人識別資訊 (PII)，包括個人姓名、年齡、國籍、電話號碼和電信詳細資料。 * 該演員指控該人針對未成年人、敲詐勒索和騷擾，但這些指控尚未得到獨立證實。 * 該貼文鼓勵其他人騷擾該個人，並承諾繼續發布更多個人資訊。分析師註：無論指控如何，發布個人資訊和鼓勵騷擾都會顯著增加私刑、毆打和其他現實世界傷害的風險。在執法部門或其他可靠來源確認之前，這些貼文中的說法應被視為未經證實。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: U.S. charges operators of bulletproof hosting services used by ransomware groups U.S. prosecutors unsealed charges against three Russian nationals accused of operating Media Land and http://ML.Cloud, bulletproof hosting providers allegedly used for ransomware, malware delivery, phishing and command-and-control infrastructure. Authorities attribute more than $62 million in victim damages to criminal activity supported by the services. The U.S. is also offering rewards of up to $10 million for information concerning government-linked associates or use of the infrastructure. #DDW #Intelligence #USA
posts.text_zh: 美國指控勒索軟體組織使用的防彈託管服務運營商 美國檢察官對三名俄羅斯國民提出指控，他們被指控運營 Media Land 和 http://ML.Cloud，這兩家防彈託管提供商涉嫌用於勒索軟體、惡意軟體傳播、網路釣魚和命令與控制基礎設施。當局將超過 6,200 萬美元的受害者損失歸因於這些服務支持的犯罪活動。美國也對與政府有關聯的員工或基礎設施使用相關的資訊提供高達 1000 萬美元的獎勵。 #DDW #情報 #美國

posts.text: 🇫🇷 Alleged Data Breach Exposes Sensitive Records from French Holiday Camp Organization A threat actor claims to have compromised http://CroqVacances.org, a French holiday camp organization, and is advertising a large collection of user and applicant data. According to the forum post: * The actor claims the dataset contains information on 72,916 individuals. * The advertised data allegedly includes 72,639 user accounts (including 69,477 bcrypt password hashes and 25 administrator accounts), 71,181 contact records, and 9,021 job applications. * The post also claims access to approximately 24 GB of uploaded documents, including CVs, diplomas, ID scans, vaccination records, and photos. * Additional allegedly exposed information includes Social Security numbers, national ID numbers, passport numbers, transport card numbers, medical records, names, addresses, phone numbers, email addresses, dates of birth, and driver's licenses. Analyst Note: These claims have not been independently verified. If confirmed, the combination of identity documents, medical information, and employment records would represent a highly sensitive exposure that could significantly increase the risk of identity theft, fraud, and targeted social engineering. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #France
posts.text_zh: 🇫🇷 涉嫌資料外洩揭露了法國度假營組織的敏感記錄 一名威脅行為者聲稱已經入侵了法國度假營組織 http://CroqVacances.org，並正在宣傳大量用戶和申請人資料。根據論壇貼文： * 該行為者聲稱該資料集包含 72,916 個人的資訊。 * 據稱，廣告資料包括 72,639 個使用者帳戶（包括 69,477 個 bcrypt 密碼雜湊值和 25 個管理員帳戶）、71,181 個聯絡人記錄和 9,021 份工作申請。 * 該貼文還聲稱可以存取約 24 GB 的上傳文件，包括簡歷、文憑、身分證掃描件、疫苗接種記錄和照片。 * 據稱洩漏的其他資訊包括社會安全號碼、國民身分證號碼、護照號碼、交通卡號碼、醫療記錄、姓名、地址、電話號碼、電子郵件地址、出生日期和駕照。分析師註：這些說法尚未得到獨立證實。如果得到證實，身分證件、醫療資訊和就業記錄的組合將代表高度敏感的暴露，可能會顯著增加身分盜竊、詐欺和有針對性的社會工程的風險。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #France

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇪🇸 Alleged Exposure Impacts Spanish Football Federation Coaching Platform A threat actor claims to have discovered a misconfigured Firebase deployment affecting http://academia.rfef.es, the official coaching academy platform of the Royal Spanish Football Federation (RFEF). According to the forum post: * The actor claims a publicly accessible Firebase Storage bucket exposed approximately 504 files (around 182 MB) without authentication. * The exposed files allegedly include student documents, profile photos, invoices, and scans of Spanish national identity cards (DNI), including both front and back images. * The actor also claims to have enumerated 113,681 Firebase Authentication user IDs through a publicly accessible Realtime Database endpoint. * The post attributes the exposure to misconfigured cloud storage and database permissions rather than exploitation of a software vulnerability. Analyst Note: These claims have not been independently verified. If accurate, the incident would highlight the continued risk posed by cloud storage misconfigurations, particularly where identity documents and sensitive user files are stored without proper access controls. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Spain
posts.text_zh: 🇪🇸 涉嫌曝光影響西班牙足協教練平台 一名威脅行為者聲稱發現了配置錯誤的 Firebase 部署，影響了西班牙皇家足協 (RFEF) 的官方教練學院平台 http://academia.rfef.es。根據論壇貼文： * 攻擊者聲稱，一個可公開存取的 Firebase 儲存桶在未經身份驗證的情況下暴露了大約 504 個檔案（約 182 MB）。 * 據稱，曝光的文件包括學生文件、個人資料照片、發票和西班牙國民身分證 (DNI) 的掃描件，包括正面和背面影像。 * 該攻擊者還聲稱透過可公開存取的即時資料庫端點列舉了 113,681 個 Firebase 驗證使用者 ID。 * 該貼文將此事件歸因於錯誤配置的雲端儲存和資料庫權限，而不是利用軟體漏洞。分析師註：這些說法尚未得到獨立證實。如果準確的話，該事件將凸顯雲端儲存配置錯誤所帶來的持續風險，特別是在沒有適當存取控制的情況下儲存身分識別文件和敏感使用者文件的情況。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Spain

posts.text: 🚨 DarkMatter ransomware operation advertises affiliate program A forum actor is advertising DarkMatter (not to be confused with one of the world's currently largest darknet markets), a newly introduced ransomware operation targeting small, medium, and large enterprises while claiming to exclude healthcare organizations and entities located in the CIS region. The listing says CIS-based affiliates must pay a $250 entry fee, while non-CIS affiliates are charged $500 in Bitcoin or Monero. The operators are seeking a limited number of Russian-speaking partners and claim average affiliate payouts of approximately $70,000. The advertised Windows ransomware supports multithreaded encryption, Active Directory integration, network propagation, credential dumping, security-tool disruption, event-log clearing, virtual machine detection, ESXi targeting, encrypted TOR-based victim portals, and configurable ransom notes. The operators also claim to provide custom builds, dedicated infrastructure, encrypted communications, and real-time reporting. This claim is currently unverified. 💥 Get early visibility into underground claims, including unblurred screenshots, before they turn into headlines: http://darkwebinformer.com/pricing

posts.text: 🚨STORM Windows info stealer advertised for $350 per month A forum actor is advertising STORM, a Windows-based information stealer written in C++ and marketed with uniquely compiled builds, obfuscation, encrypted delivery, and a web-based control panel. The listing claims the malware can extract browser data, passwords, cookies, cryptocurrency wallets, password manager data, messenger sessions, Discord tokens, files, screenshots, and detailed system information. It also includes a configurable loader capable of downloading and executing additional EXE, DLL, and PowerShell files. The standard license is priced at $350 per month, while a team license with 100 user slots and 200 build slots costs $700 per month. The seller states that the malware will not target systems located in Russia or the CIS. This claim is currently unverified. 💥 Get early visibility into underground claims, including unblurred screenshots, before they turn into headlines: http://darkwebinformer.com/pricing

posts.name: vxunderground
posts.text: R to @vxunderground: Dawg, I'll tell you something right now though, if my son is like six, and he's like, "Dad, you're on beep boop machine a lot. Can you teach me how to malware?". I'll say, "My son, my flesh and blood, my beautiful baby boy. Sit down. We begin now". Then I will transfer everything I know about malware from my brain into his brain over several years. When he is a pre-teen he will possess all of my malware knowledge and he will inherit vx-underground when I die. Or maybe he'll think malware is stinky nerd shit and instead want to play video games with his friends and do psychologically normal things. Only time will tell.
posts.text_zh: R 致@vxunderground：老兄，如果我的兒子大概六歲了，我現在就告訴你一些事情，他會說，「爸爸，你經常使用嘟嘟機器。你能教我如何惡意軟體嗎？」。我會說，「我的兒子，我的骨肉，我美麗的男嬰。坐下。我們現在開始」。然後我會在幾年內將我所知道的有關惡意軟體的所有知識從我的大腦轉移到他的大腦。當他還是個十幾歲的孩子時，他將擁有我所有的惡意軟體知識，並且當我死後他將繼承 vx-underground。或者他可能會認為惡意軟體是臭書呆子的狗屎，而是想和他的朋友一起玩視頻遊戲並做心理上正常的事情。只有時間才能證明一切。

posts.name: vxunderground
posts.text: Chat, my entire life I've hated going outside. I like being on beep boop machine and doing malware stuff. However, my son is 16 months old and, despite everything, I have been extremely happy and fulfilled spending time with my son and extended family outside. For the first time in my life I do not hate outside because my son is happy outside. He plays in the dirt, farts, and says "Dad?" while pointing at stuff. It is cool and badass. Being a Dad is super cool and super badass. Anyway, I see your malwares you've sent me. I plan on getting to it. I have lots of stuff planned. However, it is low priority for me at the moment because my son and I are busy (playing in the dirt, farting, etc). Overall I'd rate having children a 10/10. Having a little dude call you "Dad" makes you feel good inside in a way nothing else can
posts.text_zh: 聊天，我一生都討厭出去。我喜歡在 beep boop 機器上做惡意軟體的事情。然而，我的兒子已經 16 個月大了，儘管發生了這一切，我還是非常高興和滿足地與我的兒子和大家庭在外面度過了時光。我有生以來第一次不再討厭外面，因為我兒子在外面很開心。他在泥土裡玩耍，放屁，然後說「爸爸？」一邊指著東西。它很酷而且很酷。當爸爸真是太酷了，太厲害了。不管怎樣，我看到了你寄給我的惡意軟體。我計劃去實現它。我有很多事情計劃。然而，目前對我來說優先順序較低，因為我和我的兒子很忙（在泥土中玩耍、放屁等）。總的來說，我對生孩子的評價是10/10。有個小傢伙叫你「爸爸」會讓你內心感覺良好，這是其他任何事情都做不到的

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🚨 Threat Actor Claims to Be Selling TeamViewer SSRF Exploit A threat actor has advertised what they claim is a critical Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) vulnerability affecting TeamViewer. According to the forum post: * The actor claims the vulnerability has a CVSS severity of 9.0+. * It is described as an SSRF issue rather than a full remote code execution (RCE) exploit. * The seller alleges the vulnerability can expose cloud instance credentials through metadata services, potentially enabling further compromise. * The exploit is being offered for private sale, with the actor also seeking a broker for additional vulnerabilities. Analyst Note: At this time, these claims remain unverified, and no public evidence has been provided to demonstrate the existence or impact of the alleged vulnerability. Organizations using TeamViewer should continue following security best practices, including prompt patching, restricting unnecessary outbound connectivity, and monitoring for abnormal access to cloud metadata services. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #TeamViewer
posts.text_zh: 🚨 威脅行為者聲稱正在銷售 TeamViewer SSRF 漏洞 威脅行為者宣傳了他們聲稱影響 TeamViewer 的關鍵伺服器端請求偽造 (SSRF) 漏洞。根據論壇貼文： * 攻擊者聲稱漏洞的 CVSS 嚴重性為 9.0+。 * 它被描述為 SSRF 問題，而不是完整的遠端程式碼執行 (RCE) 漏洞。 * 賣家聲稱該漏洞可以透過元資料服務暴露雲端實例憑證，可能導致進一步的洩漏。 * 漏洞正在私下出售，攻擊者還在尋找其他漏洞的經紀人。分析師註釋：目前，這些說法尚未得到證實，也沒有提供公開證據來證明所指控的漏洞的存在或影響。使用 TeamViewer 的組織應繼續遵循安全最佳實踐，包括及時修補、限制不必要的出站連線以及監控對雲端元資料服務的異常存取。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #TeamViewer

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇵🇰 Threat Actor Claims to Offer 605 Million Pakistani Identity Records A threat actor has advertised what they describe as one of the largest collections of Pakistani citizen data on an underground forum, claiming the dataset contains approximately 605 million historical and merged identity records. According to the post: * The dataset allegedly contains around 605 million records compiled from multiple historical sources. * Claimed data includes CNIC numbers, full names, gender, dates of birth, and family relationship information. * The seller also claims the dataset contains historical mobile numbers, SIM activation dates, and associated telecom operators. * Additional fields allegedly include permanent and temporary addresses, city and district information, and historical merged datasets from previous leaks. * The actor states that part of the dataset is available for free, while the complete collection is being offered for sale. Analyst Note: These claims have not been independently verified. The advertised volume likely reflects the aggregation of multiple historical leaks rather than a single new compromise. Nevertheless, such consolidated datasets can significantly increase the effectiveness of identity fraud, social engineering, and telecom-based attacks. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Pakistan
posts.text_zh: 🇵🇰 威脅行為者聲稱提供 6.05 億筆巴基斯坦身分記錄 威脅行為者在地下論壇上宣傳了他們所描述的最大的巴基斯坦公民資料集合之一，聲稱該資料集包含大約 6.05 億筆歷史和合併的身分記錄。根據該貼文： * 據稱，該資料集包含從多個歷史來源彙編的約 6.05 億筆記錄。 * 聲稱的資料包括 CNIC 號碼、全名、性別、出生日期和家庭關係資訊。 * 賣家還聲稱該資料集包含歷史手機號碼、SIM 卡啟動日期和相關電信業者。 * 據稱其他欄位包括永久和臨時地址、城市和地區資訊以及先前洩露的歷史合併資料集。 * 該演員表示，部分資料集是免費提供的，而完整的集合正在出售。分析師註：這些說法尚未得到獨立證實。公佈的數量可能反映了多個歷史洩露的匯總，而不是單一新的洩漏。儘管如此，這種整合的資料集可以顯著提高身分詐欺、社會工程和電信攻擊的有效性。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Pakistan

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: Finland issues a wanted notice for the convicted Vastaamo extortion hacker Finnish authorities issued a wanted notice for Aleksanteri Kivimäki after the Supreme Court declined to hear his appeal, making his sentence enforceable. Kivimäki was convicted over the Vastaamo psychotherapy breach, in which highly sensitive patient records were stolen, published through dark web channels, and used to extort tens of thousands of patients individually. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Finland
posts.text_zh: 芬蘭對被定罪的 Vastaamo 勒索黑客發出通緝令 在最高法院拒絕審理 Aleksanteri Kivimäki 的上訴後，芬蘭當局對 Aleksanteri Kivimäki 發出了通緝令，使他的判決得以執行。 Kivimäki 因 Vastaamo 心理治療違規事件被定罪，該事件中高度敏感的患者記錄被盜，並通過暗網渠道發布，並用於勒索數萬名患者。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Finland

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇲🇽 UMMA Educational Systems in Mexico Allegedly Compromised A threat actor has claimed to have compromised the systems of UMMA, alleging that multiple educational platforms and databases were fully dumped. According to the forum post: * The actor claims to have obtained numerous databases associated with UMMA's school systems. * The leaked database names reference student, graduate, employment, event, HR, survey, academic, and administrative systems. * Multiple campus- and region-specific systems are allegedly included in the compromise. * The post suggests the complete database collection is being offered for sale on the underground forum. Analyst Note: These claims have not been independently verified. If authentic, the breach could expose sensitive student, employee, and institutional information across multiple educational platforms. Organizations should investigate the claims, review access logs for unauthorized activity, and assess whether any sensitive data has been exposed. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Mexico
posts.text_zh: 🇲🇽 墨西哥 UMMA 教育系統據稱遭到破壞 一名威脅行為者聲稱已破壞 UMMA 系統，並聲稱多個教育平台和資料庫已被完全轉儲。根據論壇貼文： * 這位演員聲稱已獲得與 UMMA 學校系統相關的大量資料庫。 * 洩漏的資料庫名稱涉及學生、畢業生、就業、活動、人力資源、調查、學術和管理系統。 * 據稱，多個校園和地區特定係統都包含在此次攻擊中。 * 該貼文暗示完整的資料庫集合正在地下論壇上出售。分析師註：這些說法尚未得到獨立證實。如果屬實，該漏洞可能會在多個教育平台上暴露敏感的學生、員工和機構資訊。組織應調查這些聲明，檢查存取日誌是否有未經授權的活動，並評估是否有任何敏感資料外洩。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Mexico

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🔞 2012 YouPorn Credential Breach Resurfaces on Underground Forum for FREE A threat actor has reposted a historical database linked to the February 2012 YouPorn breach, making the dataset available for download. According to the forum post: * More than 1.3 million user accounts were reportedly affected. * Exposed data included email addresses and plaintext passwords. * The listing appears to redistribute an old, previously disclosed breach rather than document a new compromise. * A download link was shared through the underground forum. Analyst Note: Although this is historical data, recycled credential dumps remain useful for credential stuffing, password reuse attacks, phishing, and victim profiling. Anyone who reused the same password on other services should change it immediately and enable MFA where available. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #YouPorn
posts.text_zh: 🔞 2012 年 YouPorn 憑證洩露事件在地下論壇上免費重現 威脅行為者重新發布了與 2012 年 2 月 YouPorn 洩露事件相關的歷史資料庫，使該資料集可供下載。根據論壇貼文： * 據報導，超過 130 萬個使用者帳號受到影響。 * 暴露的資料包括電子郵件地址和明文密碼。 * 該清單似乎重新分發了先前披露的舊漏洞，而不是記錄了新的妥協。 * 下載連結是透過地下論壇分享的。分析師註釋：儘管這是歷史數據，但回收的憑證轉儲對於憑證填充、密碼重用攻擊、網路釣魚和受害者分析仍然有用。在其他服務上重複使用相同密碼的任何人都應立即更改密碼並在可用的情況下啟用 MFA。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #YouPorn

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: Microsoft maps ShinyHunters’ OAuth-driven Salesforce intrusion playbook Microsoft published new research detailing how activity associated with ShinyHunters has compromised Salesforce-connected environments through voice phishing, malicious OAuth consent, compromised integrations, and abuse of legitimate connected applications. Microsoft says the campaigns rely primarily on trusted identities and workflows rather than a vulnerability in Salesforce itself. #DDW #Intelligence #Microsoft #ShinyHunters
posts.text_zh: Microsoft 繪製了 ShinyHunters 的 OAuth 驅動的 Salesforce 入侵手冊 Microsoft 發布了新的研究，詳細介紹了與 ShinyHunters 相關的活動如何透過語音網路釣魚、惡意 OAuth 同意、受損整合和濫用合法連接應用程式來危害 Salesforce 連接環境。微軟表示，這些活動主要依賴可信任身分和工作流程，而不是 Salesforce 本身的漏洞。 #DDW #Intelligence #Microsoft #ShinyHunters

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🚨 Doxbin Administrator “KT” Sentenced to Prison Callum Dare, a Doxbin administrator known online as “KT” and “Chans,” has been sentenced in Wales to two years and three months in prison for encouraging swatting attacks. * Dare encouraged and assisted swatting incidents targeting victims in the UK, U.S., and Canada. * He created and shared compilation videos of armed police responses to promote further attacks. * Investigators linked Doxbin activity to a PayPal account and email address that identified him. * Police also recovered phishing software designed to imitate dark-web marketplaces and steal credentials. Analyst Note: Swatting is not an online prank. False reports can trigger armed police deployments, place innocent people in immediate danger, and divert emergency resources from genuine incidents. This case also shows how small operational-security mistakes can expose administrators behind anonymous cybercrime platforms. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Doxbin
posts.text_zh: 🚨 Doxbin 管理員“KT”被判入獄 Callum Dare 是一名網名為“KT”和“Chans”的 Doxbin 管理員，因鼓勵毆打攻擊而在威爾士被判處兩年零三個月監禁。 * Dare 鼓勵並協助針對英國、美國和加拿大受害者的毆打事件。 * 他製作並分享了武警應對措施的彙編視頻，以推動進一步的襲擊。 * 調查人員將 Doxbin 活動與可識別他身分的 PayPal 帳戶和電子郵件地址連結。 * 警方也查獲了旨在模仿暗網市場並竊取憑證的網路釣魚軟體。分析師註：毆打不是網路惡作劇。虛假報告可能會觸發武裝警察部署，使無辜人民面臨直接危險，並轉移處理真實事件的緊急資源。此案例還表明，微小的操作安全錯誤可能會暴露匿名網路犯罪平台背後的管理員。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Doxbin

posts.text_zh: ️🇺🇸 ShinyHunters 命名雅培旗下的 Exact Sciences Corporation Exact Sciences 是一家總部位於威斯康星州麥迪遜市的癌症篩檢和診斷測試製造商，以其旗艦非侵入性結直腸癌測試 Cologuard 聞名，該公司於 2026 年 3 月通過約 230 億美元的收購成為雅培的全資子公司的全資子公司。

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🚨 EU and UK Launch First Joint Cyber Sanctions Against Russia The European Union and the United Kingdom have announced their first coordinated cyber sanctions package, targeting Russian intelligence officers, hackers, and organizations accused of years of cyberattacks and hybrid operations across Europe. * 🇪🇺 EU sanctioned 9 individuals and 4 entities. * 🇬🇧 UK sanctioned 24 individuals and organizations. * Targets include GRU officers, cyber operators, and infrastructure supporting Russian cyber operations. * Measures include asset freezes, travel bans, and financial restrictions. Analyst Note: This marks one of the strongest coordinated Western responses to state-sponsored cyber operations. Rather than focusing solely on malware campaigns, the sanctions target the broader ecosystem; including intelligence officers, cybercriminal proxies, and enabling organizations, signaling a continued shift toward imposing tangible costs on offensive cyber activity. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Russia
posts.text_zh: 🚨 歐盟和英國首次針對俄羅斯實施聯合網路制裁 歐盟和英國宣布了首個協調一致的網路制裁方案，針對俄羅斯情報官員、駭客以及被指控多年來在歐洲各地進行網路攻擊和混合行動的組織。 * 🇪🇺 歐盟制裁了 9 名個人和 4 家實體。 * 🇬🇧 英國制裁了 24 位個人和組織。 * 目標包括 GRU 官員、網路營運商和支援俄羅斯網路運營的基礎設施。 * 措施包括資產凍結、旅行禁令和財務限制。分析師註：這標誌著西方對國家支持的網路行動最強烈的協調反應之一。制裁不僅針對惡意軟體活動，而是針對更廣泛的生態系統；包括情報官員、網路犯罪代理人和支援組織，這標誌著對攻擊性網路活動施加有形成本的持續轉變。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Russia

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇫🇷 TotalEnergies Customer Database Allegedly Offered for Sale A threat actor has advertised the alleged sale of a TotalEnergies customer database on an underground forum, claiming the dataset contains approximately 20 million customer records. According to the forum post: * The database allegedly contains around 20 million customer records. * Claimed fields include names, phone numbers, addresses, postal codes, municipalities, customer categories, supplier identifiers, tariff plans, contracted power, and other account-related information. * The seller shared sample records purportedly linked to TotalEnergies France. * The dataset is being advertised for sale for €650. Analyst Note: These claims have not been independently verified. If authentic, the exposure could affect a significant number of TotalEnergies customers and increase the risk of phishing, identity fraud, and targeted social engineering. Organizations should validate the authenticity of the samples, investigate the source of the data, and notify affected parties if necessary. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #France
posts.text_zh: 🇫🇷 據稱出售 TotalEnergies 客戶資料庫 威脅行為者在地下論壇上宣傳涉嫌出售 TotalEnergies 客戶資料庫，聲稱該資料集包含約 2,000 萬筆客戶記錄。根據論壇貼文： * 該資料庫據稱包含約 2,000 萬筆客戶記錄。 * 聲明的欄位包括姓名、電話號碼、地址、郵遞區號、城市、客戶類別、供應商識別碼、資費計畫、合約電力和其他帳戶相關資訊。 * 賣家分享了據稱與 TotalEnergies France 有關的樣本記錄。 * 該資料集的廣告售價為 650 歐元。分析師註：這些說法尚未得到獨立證實。如果屬實，該洩漏可能會影響大量 TotalEnergies 客戶，並增加網路釣魚、身分詐欺和有針對性的社會工程的風險。組織應驗證樣本的真實性，調查資料來源，並在必要時通知受影響方。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #France

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇦🇷 Argentine Judiciary Data Allegedly Leaked by Threat Actor A threat actor claiming affiliation with Jama'at Al has posted what they describe as a leak of sensitive records from Argentina's judiciary system. According to the post, the exposed data allegedly includes: * Full names * Case and file numbers * Incident numbers * Document identifiers * Associated records * Account IDs and account creation dates * Jurisdiction information The threat actor claims the data originates from restricted judicial records and attributes the intrusion to one of its sub-groups. Analyst Note: These claims have not been independently verified. If authentic, the exposure of judicial records could present significant privacy, legal, and operational risks for affected individuals and government entities. Authorities should investigate the claims, assess the authenticity of the shared data, and determine whether any unauthorized access occurred. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Argentina
posts.text_zh: 🇦🇷 阿根廷司法資料據稱被威脅行為者洩露 一名聲稱與 Jama'at Al 有聯繫的威脅行為者發布了他們所說的阿根廷司法系統敏感記錄的洩露信息。根據該帖子，暴露的資料據稱包括： * 全名 * 案件和檔案編號 * 事件編號 * 文件識別碼 * 相關記錄 * 帳戶 ID 和帳戶創建日期 * 管轄權資訊 威脅行為者聲稱這些資料源自受限的司法記錄，並將入侵歸因於其子團體之一。分析師註：這些說法尚未得到獨立證實。如果真實，司法記錄的曝光可能會給受影響的個人和政府實體帶來重大的隱私、法律和營運風險。當局應調查這些說法，評估共享資料的真實性，並確定是否發生任何未經授權的存取。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Argentina

posts.text: Ransomware groups increasingly rebrand to evade tracking and enforcement A new analysis describes accelerating rebranding among ransomware and extortion groups, with operators changing names, infrastructure, payment methods, and business models while retaining operational continuity. The report cites overlaps among several ostensibly separate brands and notes 1,885 ransomware and extortion attacks during the previous three months. #DDW #Intelligence #ransomware #wsj
posts.text_zh: 勒索軟體團體越來越多地重塑品牌以逃避追蹤和執法 一項新的分析描述了勒索軟體和勒索團體的品牌重塑加速，運營商改變名稱、基礎設施、支付方式和業務模式，同時保持運營連續性。該報告引用了幾個表面上獨立的品牌之間的重疊，並指出過去三個月發生了 1,885 起勒索軟體和勒索攻擊。 #DDW #Intelligence #勒索軟體 #wsj

Analyst Note: These claims have not been independently verified. Organizations using the affected platform should investigate the authenticity of the leaked data, review authentication logs for suspicious activity, rotate credentials if necessary, and monitor for any signs of unauthorized access. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #CyberSecurity

posts.text: 🇻🇪 Venezuelan Maritime Authority Allegedly Breached, 127K+ Records Claimed A threat actor has published a post claiming to have compromised Venezuela's National Institute of Aquatic Spaces (INEA), alleging the theft of sensitive government and maritime sector data. According to the post: * 114,265 mariner records were allegedly obtained, including personal information and photographs. * 13,485 maritime company records were also reportedly compromised. * The actor claims the dataset includes legal documents, company information, and employee records. * Proof-of-concept (PoC) samples were shared on the underground forum to support the claim. Analyst Note: These claims have not been independently verified. If confirmed, the exposure could impact both individual mariners and organizations operating within Venezuela's maritime sector. Government agencies and affected organizations should investigate the claims, validate the authenticity of the shared samples, and monitor for potential misuse of the exposed data. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Venezuela
posts.text_zh: 🇻🇪 委內瑞拉海事管理局據稱遭到破壞，超過 127,000 條記錄被盜 一名威脅行為者發布了一篇帖子，聲稱已入侵委內瑞拉國家水生空間研究所 (INEA)，並指控政府和海事部門的敏感數據被盜。根據該貼文： * 據稱獲得了 114,265 份海員記錄，包括個人資訊和照片。 * 據報道，13,485 家海事公司的記錄也遭到洩露。 * 攻擊者聲稱資料集包括法律文件、公司資訊和員工記錄。 * 概念驗證 (PoC) 樣本在地下論壇上共享以支持此主張。分析師註：這些說法尚未得到獨立證實。如果得到證實，該事件可能會影響個別海員和在委內瑞拉海事部門運作的組織。政府機構和受影響的組織應調查這些說法，驗證共享樣本的真實性，並監控暴露數據的潛在濫用。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Venezuela

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇫🇷 France Pare-Brise Claims New Leak Surface on Underground Forum A threat actor has published a new post claiming to have compromised France Pare-Brise through an alleged IDOR (Insecure Direct Object Reference) vulnerability. According to the forum post: * The actor claims to have scraped data from more than 100,000 users. * Around 5,000 complete user files were allegedly leaked as proof of compromise. * The post attributes the exposure to an IDOR vulnerability affecting customer records. * The actor claims the leaked files contain complete user documents related to the alleged breach. Analyst Note: These claims remain unverified at this time. However, if confirmed, an IDOR vulnerability could allow unauthorized access to sensitive customer information without requiring traditional authentication bypasses. Organizations should investigate any reports promptly, review access controls, and monitor for signs of exploitation. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #France
posts.text_zh: 🇫🇷 France Pare-Brise 在地下論壇上聲稱出現新的洩露面 威脅行為者發布了一篇新帖子，聲稱通過所謂的 IDOR（不安全直接對象引用）漏洞危害了 France Pare-Brise。根據論壇貼文： * 該攻擊者聲稱已從超過 100,000 個用戶處抓取了資料。 * 據稱，大約 5,000 個完整的用戶文件被洩露作為妥協的證據。 * 該貼文將此事件歸因於影響客戶記錄的 IDOR 漏洞。 * 攻擊者聲稱洩漏的文件包含與涉嫌違規行為相關的完整使用者文件。分析師註：這些說法目前尚未得到證實。然而，如果得到證實，IDOR 漏洞可能允許未經授權存取敏感客戶訊息，而無需繞過傳統身份驗證。組織應立即調查任何報告、審查存取控制並監控利用跡象。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #France

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇺🇸 MC Hypermine Database Resurfaces on Underground Forum A threat actor has reposted the MC Hypermine database, a breach originally linked to the U.S.-based Minecraft server MC Hypermine. According to the forum post: * The dataset allegedly contains approximately 269,500 user records. * Exposed data reportedly includes usernames, SHA-1 password hashes, and IP addresses. * The breach is stated to have originally occurred in June 2020. * The actor is redistributing the dataset on an underground forum, making historical compromised data accessible once again. Analyst Note: While this appears to be a re-release of an older breach rather than a new incident, recycled databases remain valuable to threat actors for credential stuffing, password-cracking campaigns, and victim profiling. Users who may have reused passwords from older accounts should ensure those credentials have been changed and that MFA is enabled wherever possible. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #USA
posts.text_zh: 🇺🇸 MC Hypermine 資料庫在地下論壇上重新出現 威脅行為者重新發布了 MC Hypermine 資料庫，而該漏洞最初與位於美國的 Minecraft 伺服器 MC Hypermine 有關。根據論壇貼文： * 據稱該資料集包含約 269,500 筆使用者記錄。 * 據報道，暴露的資料包括使用者名稱、SHA-1 密碼雜湊值和 IP 位址。 * 據報道，此次洩漏最初發生在 2020 年 6 月。 * 攻擊者正在地下論壇上重新分發資料集，使歷史受損資料再次可供存取。分析師註釋：雖然這似乎是舊漏洞的重新發布，而不是新事件，但回收的資料庫對於威脅行為者的撞庫、密碼破解活動和受害者分析仍然很有價值。可能重複使用舊帳戶密碼的使用者應確保這些憑證已更改，並盡可能啟用 MFA。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #USA

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇧🇪 http://Betrail.run Allegedly Suffers Data Exposure Affecting 2.8 Million Runner Records A threat actor has published what they claim is a partial database from http://Betrail.run, a Belgium-based platform used by trail running enthusiasts to discover races, track results, and monitor performance. According to the forum post: * The leaked dataset allegedly contains approximately 2.8 million runner records. * The actor claims the "runners.jsonl" file contains publicly available runner information, while additional files were obtained by exploiting vulnerabilities. * The dataset is said to primarily include records from France, Belgium, Spain, the United States, Italy, Switzerland, Germany, the Netherlands, Australia, Canada, and the United Kingdom. * No technical evidence has yet been released to independently verify the alleged vulnerability or the authenticity of the non-public data. Analyst Note: At this stage, these claims remain unverified. Organizations should wait for official confirmation while monitoring for any security advisories or disclosure from http://Betrail.run. If confirmed, users should be alert for phishing attempts and consider updating credentials if reused across multiple services. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Belgium
posts.text_zh: 🇧🇪 http://Betrail.run 據稱遭受數據洩露，影響了 280 萬條跑步記錄 威脅行為者發布了他們聲稱的來自 http://Betrail.run 的部分數據庫，這是一個總部位於比利時的平台，越野跑愛好者使用該平台來發現比賽、跟踪結果和監控表現。根據論壇貼文：* 洩漏的資料集據稱包含約 280 萬筆跑步者記錄。 * 攻擊者聲稱「runners.jsonl」文件包含公開可用的跑步者訊息，而其他文件是透過利用漏洞獲得的。 * 據說該資料集主要包括來自法國、比利時、西班牙、美國、義大利、瑞士、德國、荷蘭、澳洲、加拿大和英國的記錄。 * 尚未發布技術證據來獨立驗證所指控的漏洞或非公開資料的真實性。分析師註：現階段，這些說法尚未被證實。組織應等待官方確認，同時監控來自 http://Betrail.run 的任何安全建議或揭露。如果獲得確認，使用者應警惕網路釣魚嘗試，並考慮更新憑證（如果在多個服務中重複使用）。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Belgium

posts.name: DarkWebInformer
posts.text: 🚨🇦🇺 AASolutions Accounting Australia data allegedly offered for sale A forum actor claims to be selling data allegedly obtained from AASolutions, an Australian accounting services provider specializing in bookkeeping, tax, SMSF administration, investment administration, and compliance support. The listing advertises more than 33,900 records spread across three datasets. No fixed asking price was disclosed, with the actor requesting one-time purchase offers payable in Bitcoin, Ethereum, or Monero. The allegedly exposed information includes client and company names, addresses, email addresses, phone numbers, directors, account managers, advisers, portfolio values, tax file numbers, trustee details, practice information, financial classifications, and account status data. Samples were published with the listing. This claim is currently unverified. 💥 Get early visibility into underground claims, including unblurred screenshots, before they turn into headlines: http://darkwebinformer.com/pricing
posts.text_zh: 🚨🇦🇺 AASolutions Accounting Australia 數據涉嫌出售 一名論壇參與者聲稱出售據稱從 AASolutions 獲得的數據，AASolutions 是一家專門從事簿記、稅務、SMSF 管理、投資管理和合規支持的澳大利亞會計服務提供商。該清單公佈了分佈在三個資料集中的 33,900 多筆記錄。沒有透露固定的要價，演員要求一次性購買報價以比特幣、以太坊或門羅幣支付。據稱暴露的資訊包括客戶和公司名稱、地址、電子郵件地址、電話號碼、董事、客戶經理、顧問、投資組合價值、稅號、受託人詳細資料、執業資訊、財務分類和帳戶狀態資料。樣品隨清單一起發布。目前這一說法尚未得到證實。 💥 在地下索賠成為頭條新聞之前儘早了解它們，包括清晰的螢幕截圖：http://darkwebinformer.com/pricing

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🪖 Alleged "NATO TOP SECRET" Documents Offered for Sale on Underground Forum A threat actor is advertising what they claim are classified NATO strategic documents dated 2025–2026. According to the marketplace listing, the package allegedly contains documents related to: * The 2026 NATO Summit in Ankara * Eastern Flank strategy and force posture * Intelligence collection and covert rotation concepts * OPLAN 41026 "Enhanced Deterrence East" * Supply chain and fuel logistics vulnerabilities * Nuclear weapon transportation doctrine * SHAPE C4ISR architecture * Allied Joint Force Command planning * Multinational submarine and anti-submarine exercise manuals The seller labels the material as "NATO TOP SECRET" and is offering the collection for sale for approximately $2,500. Analyst Note: There is currently no evidence that these documents are authentic or classified. Underground forums frequently advertise fabricated, outdated, publicly available, or recycled military documents to attract buyers. Any claims regarding classified NATO material should be treated with caution until independently verified. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #NATO
posts.text_zh: 🪖 所謂的「北約絕密」文件在地下論壇上出售 一名威脅行為者正在宣傳他們聲稱的 2025-2026 年北約機密戰略文件。根據市場清單，該包裹據稱包含與以下內容相關的文件： * 2026 年安卡拉北約峰會 * 東翼戰略和兵力態勢 * 情報收集和秘密輪換概念 * OPLAN 41026「東部增強威懾」 * 供應鍊和燃料物流漏洞 * 核武運輸條令 * SHAPE C4ISR 架構TOP” SECRET”，該系列的售價約為 2,500 美元。

posts.name: MonThreat
posts.text: 🚨 TeamPCP Claims GitHub Internal Repos and Source Code in Fire Sale A threat actor operating under the alias TeamPCP has posted a listing on an underground forum claiming to possess internal repositories and source code from GitHub. The post, dated July 14, 2026, describes the material as a "fire sale," suggesting an urgent attempt to liquidate the stolen assets. According to the statement, the exposed data includes: * Internal repositories * Source code GitHub is a critical component of the global software development infrastructure, hosting millions of public and private repositories for organizations ranging from small startups to major enterprises. A breach of this magnitude would represent a significant compromise of intellectual property and potentially expose vulnerabilities in widely used software libraries. If authentic, exposure of internal repositories could enable intellectual property theft and infrastructure targeting. At the time of reporting, the alleged breach has not been independently verified. #DataBreach #SourceCodeLeak #GitHub #TeamPCP #SoftwareSecurity #DarkWeb #ThreatIntelligence
posts.text_zh: 🚨 TeamPCP 聲稱正在賤賣 GitHub 內部儲存庫和原始程式碼 一個化名 TeamPCP 的威脅行為者在地下論壇上發布了一份清單，聲稱擁有 GitHub 的內部儲存庫和原始程式碼。該貼文日期為 2026 年 7 月 14 日，將該資料描述為“賤賣”，暗示正在緊急嘗試清算被盜資產。根據聲明，暴露的數據包括： * 內部儲存庫 * 原始碼 GitHub 是全球軟體開發基礎設施的關鍵組成部分，為從小新創公司到大型企業等組織託管數百萬個公共和私人儲存庫。如此嚴重的違規行為將嚴重損害智慧財產權，並可能暴露廣泛使用的軟體庫中的漏洞。如果是真實的，內部儲存庫的暴露可能會導致智慧財產權盜竊和基礎設施攻擊。截至本報告發布之時，所指控的違規行為尚未得到獨立核實。 #DataBreach #SourceCodeLeak #GitHub #TeamPCP #SoftwareSecurity #DarkWeb #ThreatIntelligence

posts.name: MonThreat
posts.text: 🚨 Threat Actor Claims Breach of Venezuela's INEA, Exposing 115k Mariners' Data A darkweb forum post by the threat actor '[L4TAMFUCK3R$]' alleges a complete breach of the National Institute of Aquatic Spaces (INEA) in Venezuela. According to the listing, the actor claims to have obtained the personal data of 114,265 marine users and 13,485 maritime companies. The post provides proof-of-concept JSON snippets revealing highly sensitive Personally Identifiable Information (PII) and biometric data for individual mariners. The exposed data fields include: * Full names and surnames * Identity card numbers (Cédula de Identidad) * Home addresses and phone numbers * Email addresses * Detailed physical descriptions (height, skin color, hair color, eye color, facial features) * Civil status and nationality INEA is a critical government agency in Venezuela responsible for regulating maritime activities and issuing credentials to seafarers. A breach of this scale could facilitate identity theft, social engineering attacks, and physical stalking of maritime professionals across the country. The actor also claims possession of legal documents and employee data for the affected maritime companies. At the time of reporting, the alleged breach has not been independently verified by INEA or third-party security researchers.
posts.text_zh: 🚨 威脅行為者聲稱破壞了委內瑞拉的 INEA，洩露了 115,000 名水手資料威脅行為者「[L4TAMFUCK3R$]」在暗網論壇上發帖，聲稱委內瑞拉國家水生空間研究所 (INEA) 遭到完全破壞。根據清單，該行為者聲稱已獲得 114,265 名海事用戶和 13,485 家海事公司的個人資料。該貼文提供了概念驗證 JSON 片段，揭示了個別海員的高度敏感的個人識別資訊 (PII) 和生物識別資料。暴露的資料欄位包括： * 全名和姓氏 * 身分證號碼 (Cédula de Identidad) * 家庭住址和電話號碼 * 電子郵件地址 * 詳細的身體描述（身高、膚色、頭髮顏色、眼睛顏色、臉部特徵） * 公民身分和國籍 INEA 是委內瑞拉的一個重要政府機構，負責監管證書活動並向海員執行證書。如此大規模的違規行為可能會助長全國範圍內對海事專業人員的身份盜竊、社會工程攻擊和人身跟踪。該演員還聲稱擁有受影響的海運公司的法律文件和員工資料。截至報告時，所指控的違規行為尚未得到 INEA 或第三方安全研究人員的獨立核實。

posts.name: MonThreat
posts.text: 🚨 Threat Actor Claims 126 GB http://NTC.GOV.PH Data Dump on Darkweb Forum A darkweb forum post alleges the exposure of a massive data dump from the National Telecommunications Commission of the Philippines (NTC), claiming to contain over 200,000 documents and sensitive personal information. The actor, posting under the handle "KLAMMER," asserts that the breach includes internal memos, passwords, face scans, and personally identifiable information (PII) such as names, emails, contact numbers, and addresses. The alleged data is packaged in a 126 GB archive, split into multiple ZIP files for distribution. According to the post, the leaked data encompasses various file formats including PDF, DOCX, SQL, JSON, IMG, EXE, and TXT. The actor claims the following types of data are included in the dump: * Names, emails, and contact numbers * Personal Identifiable Information (PII) and addresses * PIN codes and pass keys * Passwords * Internal memos and sensitive files * Face scans The forum post frames the data leak as retaliation for what the actor describes as government negligence regarding a school shooting incident in Tacloban. The author alleges that law enforcement ignored warnings about an extremist network linked to the attack, leading to the deaths of three students and injuries to twenty others. The post criticizes the government for blaming video games rather than addressing security failures, stating that the data dump is intended to expose this "rotting incompetence." The National Telecommunications Commission (NTC) is the primary regulatory body for telecommunications in the Philippines, overseeing licensing, spectrum management, and consumer protection. A breach of this magnitude could potentially expose sensitive regulatory records and personal data of industry stakeholders or employees if authentic. At the time of reporting, the alleged breach has not been independently verified by the NTC or third-party security researchers.
posts.text_zh: 🚨 威脅行為者聲稱暗網論壇上有 126 GB http://NTC.GOV.PH 資料轉儲 暗網論壇上的一篇貼文聲稱，菲律賓國家電信委員會 (NTC) 的大量資料轉儲被曝光，聲稱包含超過 200,000 份文件和敏感個人資訊。該攻擊者以「KLAMMER」為名發帖，聲稱此次洩露包括內部備忘錄、密碼、臉部掃描以及姓名、電子郵件、聯絡電話和地址等個人識別資訊 (PII)。所指控的數據被打包在一個 126 GB 的存檔中，並分成多個 ZIP 檔案進行分發。根據該帖子，洩漏的資料涵蓋多種文件格式，包括 PDF、DOCX、SQL、JSON、IMG、EXE 和 TXT。該演員聲稱轉儲中包含以下類型的數據： * 姓名、電子郵件和聯絡電話 * 個人識別資訊 (PII) 和地址 * PIN 碼和密鑰 * 密碼 * 內部備忘錄和敏感文件 * 面部掃描 論壇帖子將數據洩露描述為對演員所說的政府對塔克洛班校園槍擊事件的疏忽的報復。作者聲稱，執法部門忽視了與這次襲擊有關的極端主義網絡的警告，導致三名學生死亡，另外二十人受傷。這篇文章批評政府指責電子遊戲而不是解決安全問題，並指出資料轉儲的目的是揭露這種「腐爛的無能」。國家電信委員會 (NTC) 是菲律賓電信的主要監管機構，負責監督許可證、頻譜管理和消費者保護。如果真實的話，如此嚴重的違規行為可能會暴露行業利益相關者或員工的敏感監管記錄和個人資料。截至報告發佈時，所指控的違規行為尚未得到 NTC 或第三方安全研究人員的獨立核實。

posts.name: MonThreat
posts.text: ⚠️ Threat Actor Claims Full Leak of SED Bogotá Education Data A darkweb forum post claims the full leak of personal data belonging to students and teachers from educational institutions in Bogotá, Colombia. The actor, operating under the handle DozerMxOFC, alleges that the breach affects 286 schools and exposes records for over 461,000 students and nearly 16,000 teachers. According to the listing on an underground forum, the compromised dataset includes extensive personally identifiable information (PII) and sensitive health-related data. The post enumerates the following exposed fields: * **Student Data:** Document numbers (CC/NUIP), full names, dates of birth, gender, home addresses, phone numbers, institutional and personal emails, school and campus details, grade information, and health insurance provider names (EPS, IPS, ARS). * **Health & Disability Info:** Disability type codes, health disability codes, and nearby health entity names. * **Teacher Data:** Document numbers, full names, emails, phone numbers, home addresses, positions, gender, dates of birth, and internal system codes. The alleged leak targets the Secretaría de Educación Distrital (SED) of Bogotá, a critical government body responsible for managing public education in Colombia's capital. The exposure of such granular data, including national ID numbers and home addresses for hundreds of thousands of minors, poses significant risks of identity theft, social engineering, and physical safety threats if the data is authentic. At the time of reporting, the alleged breach has not been independently verified by security researchers or official statements from the Bogotá education authorities. #DataBreach #EducationSecurity #Colombia #PII #DarkWeb #IdentityTheft #ThreatIntelligence
posts.text_zh: ⚠️ 威脅行為者聲稱 SED 波哥大教育資料全部洩露 一篇暗網論壇帖子聲稱哥倫比亞波哥大教育機構的學生和教師的個人資料全部洩露。該攻擊者以 DozerMxOFC 名義進行操作，聲稱此次違規行為影響了 286 所學校，並暴露了超過 461,000 名學生和近 16,000 名教師的記錄。根據地下論壇上的列表，受損的資料集包括大量的個人識別資訊 (PII) 和敏感的健康相關資料。該貼文列舉了以下公開欄位：* **學生資料：** 文件編號 (CC/NUIP)、全名、​​出生日期、性別、家庭住址、電話號碼、機構和個人電子郵件、學校和校園詳細資料、年級資訊以及健康保險提供者名稱（EPS、IPS、ARS）。 * **健康與殘障資訊：** 殘障類型代碼、健康殘障代碼和附近的健康實體名稱。 * **教師資料：** 文件編號、全名、電子郵件、電話號碼、家庭住址、職位、性別、出生日期和內部系統代碼。涉嫌洩密的目標是波哥大教育局（SED），該機構是負責管理哥倫比亞首都公共教育的重要政府機構。此類精細資料（包括數十萬未成年人的身分證號碼和家庭住址）的暴露，如果資料是真實的，將帶來身分盜竊、社會工程和人身安全威脅的重大風險。截至本報告發布之時，安全研究人員或波哥大教育當局的官方聲明尚未對所指控的違規行為進行獨立核實。 #DataBreach #EducationSecurity #Colombia #PII #DarkWeb #IdentityTheft #ThreatIntelligence

posts.name: MonThreat
posts.text: 🚨 Alleged Alfa-Bank Customer Database Leak Exposes 1M Records on Darkweb A darkweb forum post claims to expose a partial customer database belonging to Alfa-Bank, one of Russia’s largest private banks. The listing, published on July 11, 2026, alleges the release of sensitive personal and financial data for over one million individuals. According to the post, the leaked dataset is formatted as a CSV file containing 1,032,464 rows. The actor claims the data was extracted with a last update date of July 2, 2026. The exposed columns reportedly include: * account_id * email * name (full legal name in Cyrillic) * dob (date of birth) * card_number (full primary account numbers) * primary_phone * additional_contacts (secondary phone numbers or emails) Alfa-Bank is a major financial institution in Russia, known for its digital-first banking services and significant market share. The exposure of full card numbers alongside personal identifiers such as dates of birth and phone numbers could facilitate identity theft, social engineering attacks, and fraudulent transactions if the data is authentic. At the time of reporting, the alleged breach has not been independently verified by Alfa-Bank or third-party security researchers.
posts.text_zh: 🚨 據稱阿爾法銀行客戶資料庫洩露，暗網上曝光了 100 萬條記錄 一篇暗網論壇帖子聲稱曝光了俄羅斯最大私人銀行之一阿爾法銀行的部分客戶資料庫。該清單發佈於 2026 年 7 月 11 日，聲稱洩露了超過 100 萬人的敏感個人和財務資料。根據該帖子，洩漏的資料集被格式化為包含 1,032,464 行的 CSV 檔案。該攻擊者聲稱，資料提取的最後更新日期為 2026 年 7 月 2 日。據報導，暴露的列包括：* account_id * 電子郵件 * 姓名（西里爾字母的法定全名） * dob（出生日期） * 卡號（完整的主要帳號） * 主電話 * 其他聯絡人（輔助電話號碼或電子郵件） Alfa-Bank 是俄羅斯的一家主要金融機構，以其數字優先的銀行服務和巨大的市場份額而聞名。如果資料是真實的，完整的卡號以及出生日期和電話號碼等個人識別碼的暴露可能會促進身份盜竊、社會工程攻擊和詐欺交易。截至本報告發布之時，阿爾法銀行或第三方安全研究人員尚未對所指控的違規行為進行獨立核實。

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇫🇷 Alleged DoinSport Database Advertised on Underground Forum A threat actor has claimed to be offering a database allegedly belonging to DoinSport, a French sports management and booking platform. According to the forum post, the dataset reportedly includes: * Full names * Email addresses * Phone numbers * Dates of birth * Usernames * Physical addresses * ZIP codes * Wallet-related information The actor also published sample records as purported proof of possession. Analyst Note: The authenticity, origin, and recency of the dataset have not been independently verified. If legitimate, the exposed personally identifiable information (PII) could facilitate phishing, identity theft, account takeover attempts, and other social engineering attacks targeting affected users. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #France
posts.text_zh: 🇫🇷 據稱 DoinSport 資料庫在地下論壇上刊登廣告 一名威脅行為者聲稱提供了一個據稱屬於法國體育管理和預訂平台 DoinSport 的資料庫。根據論壇帖子，據報道，該資料集包括： * 全名 * 電子郵件地址 * 電話號碼 * 出生日期 * 用戶名 * 實際地址 * 郵遞區號 * 錢包相關資訊 該行為者還發布了樣本記錄作為所謂的擁有證明。分析師註：資料集的真實性、來源和新近度尚未經過獨立驗證。如果合法，暴露的個人識別資訊 (PII) 可能會促進網路釣魚、身分盜竊、帳戶接管嘗試和其他針對受影響用戶的社會工程攻擊。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #France

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇦🇺 Australian Accounting Services Data Allegedly Leaked A threat actor claims to have leaked data associated with AASolutions, an Australian provider of outsourced accounting, tax, SMSF administration, investment administration, and compliance services. According to the forum post: * Claimed volume: more than 33,900 records * Sample fields appear to include: * Client and practice names * Email addresses and contact numbers * Postal addresses * ABNs and account codes * Directors, advisers, and account managers * Portfolio values and cash values * SMSF-related records * Risk profiles, status fields, and internal identifiers * Sample records were published as alleged proof. Analyst Note: The authenticity, freshness, and source of the dataset have not been independently verified. If legitimate, the combination of financial, portfolio, and professional-accounting data could support targeted fraud, business email compromise, impersonation, and highly tailored phishing attacks. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Australia
posts.text_zh: 🇦🇺 澳洲會計服務數據涉嫌洩露 威脅行為者聲稱洩露了與 AASolutions 相關的數據，AASolutions 是一家澳洲外包會計、稅務、SMSF 管理、投資管理和合規服務提供者。根據論壇貼文： * 聲稱數量：超過 33,900 筆記錄 * 範本欄位似乎包括： * 客戶和執業名稱 * 電子郵件地址和聯絡電話 * 郵寄地址 * ABN 和帳戶代碼 * 董事、顧問和客戶經理 * 投資組合價值和現金價值 * SMSF 相關記錄 * 風險概況、狀態欄位和內部憑證記錄和內部證據記錄作為所謂的證據。分析師註：資料集的真實性、新鮮度和來源尚未經過獨立驗證。如果合法，財務、投資組合和專業會計資料的組合可以支援有針對性的詐欺、商業電子郵件洩露、冒充和高度客製化的網路釣魚攻擊。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Australia

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇫🇷 Massive French Healthcare Dataset and Infrastructure Allegedly Offered for Sale A threat actor is advertising what they claim is a large-scale compromise of MesVaccins / SYADEM, a French digital healthcare platform, offering both sensitive data and infrastructure access. According to the listing: * Claimed dataset size: 533 GB across approximately 1.17 million files * Alleged contents include more than 534,000 healthcare documents and over 12,000 structured data files * The actor claims the package contains patient records, vaccination workflows, identity information, financial data, and operational records * The listing also alleges exposure of source code, repositories, TLS certificates, private keys, infrastructure credentials, and administrative access to multiple production environments * The seller further claims the structured databases contain more than 115 million rows spanning 11 databases Analyst Note: These claims have not been independently verified. If authentic, this would represent a severe healthcare-sector compromise, exposing both sensitive patient information and critical production infrastructure, significantly increasing the risk of identity theft, healthcare fraud, ransomware, and follow-on attacks. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #France
posts.text_zh: 🇫🇷 據稱出售大量法國醫療保健數據集和基礎設施 威脅行為者正在宣傳他們聲稱的法國數位醫療平台 MesVaccins / SYADEM 的大規模妥協，提供敏感數據和基礎設施訪問。根據清單： * 聲稱的資料集大小：533 GB，約 117 萬個文件 * 涉嫌內容包括超過 534,000 個醫療保健文件和超過 12,000 個結構化資料檔案 * 攻擊者聲稱該資料包包含病患權限、疫苗接種工作流程、身分資訊、財務資料和操作記錄檔 * 攻擊者聲稱此資料包包含病患權限、疫苗接種工作流程、身分資訊、財務資料和作業記錄存取資料庫 * 資料庫內容賣家進一步聲稱結構化資料庫包含跨越 11 個資料庫的超過 1.15 億行。 分析師註：這些說法尚未經過獨立驗證。如果屬實，這將代表醫療保健部門的嚴重妥協，暴露敏感的患者資訊和關鍵的生產基礎設施，從而顯著增加身份盜竊、醫療保健詐欺、勒索軟體和後續攻擊的風險。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #France

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🚨 Telegram's http://t.me Domain Placed on Registry-Level Hold Telegram's primary short-link domain, http://t.me, has been placed into "serverHold" status by the .ME registry, causing http://t.me links to stop resolving in web browsers worldwide. * The issue is at the registry level, not Telegram's infrastructure. * Telegram has begun using http://telegram.me as a temporary alternative. * The Telegram app itself remains operational. * The reason for the serverHold status has not been officially disclosed. Analyst Note: A serverHold action removes a domain from the global DNS, effectively making it disappear from the internet until the registry restores it. While speculation links the incident to recent sanctions activity, no official explanation has been provided by Telegram or the .ME registry. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Telegram
posts.text_zh: 🚨 Telegram 的 http://t.me 網域被置於註冊表層級保留 Telegram 的主要短連結網域 http://t.me 已被 .ME 註冊表置於「serverHold」狀態，導致 http://t.me 連結在全球網頁瀏覽器中停止解析。 * 問題出在註冊表級別，而不是 Telegram 的基礎設施級別。 * Telegram 已開始使用 http://telegram.me 作為臨時替代方案。 * Telegram 應用程式本身仍然可以運行。 * serverHold 狀態的原因尚未正式揭露。分析師註解：serverHold 操作會從全域 DNS 中刪除網域，從而有效地使其從網際網路上消失，直到登錄機碼將其還原為止。雖然猜測該事件與最近的製裁活動有關，但 Telegram 或 .ME 註冊管理機構尚未提供官方解釋。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Telegram

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🔥 The Musk–Altman Feud Escalates The long-running rivalry between Elon Musk and OpenAI CEO Sam Altman erupted again on X, with both executives exchanging public insults over AI, Apple's lawsuit, and SpaceX's proposed space-based data centers. * Altman criticized Musk's plans for orbital AI data centers. * Musk responded by defending the project and repeating allegations related to OpenAI and Apple's ongoing lawsuit. * The exchange comes amid intensifying competition between xAI and OpenAI. Beyond the social media drama, the dispute reflects the growing battle for AI leadership. As competition intensifies, disagreements are increasingly shifting from technical innovation to infrastructure, intellectual property, and public perception. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #AI
posts.text_zh: 🔥 馬斯克與奧特曼之間的不和升級埃隆·馬斯克和 OpenAI 首席執行官薩姆·奧特曼之間的長期競爭在 X 上再次爆發，兩位高管就人工智能、蘋果的訴訟以及 SpaceX 提議的太空數據中心相互公開侮辱。 * Altman 批評了 Musk 的軌道人工智慧資料中心計劃。 * 作為回應，馬斯克為該項目辯護，並重複了與 OpenAI 和蘋果正在進行的訴訟相關的指控。 * 此次交流正值 xAI 與 OpenAI 之間的競爭加劇之際。除了社群媒體上的鬧劇之外，這場爭端也反映出人工智慧領導地位之爭日益激烈。隨著競爭的加劇，分歧越來越多地從技術創新轉向基礎設施、智慧財產權和公眾認知。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #AI

posts.text: The darkest time in my life was the 3 months following my son's birth. It's not because of my son. It's because people online recommended I watch anime. I watched anime basically every single day for 90 days straight. My mind has never been the same.
posts.text_zh: 我一生中最黑暗的時期是我兒子出生後的三個月。不是因為我兒子。因為網路上有人推薦我看動漫。我連續90天基本上每天都看動漫。我的心從來都不是一樣的。

posts.name: vxunderground
posts.text: R to @vxunderground: Imagine waking up and being excited about helping Jimmy JumboToes remove malware from his computer. You unironically just send links to MalwareBytes, CCleaner, and hold their hand through the process. Then, once it's done, you decide to do it again, and for free. Fucking schizo
posts.text_zh: R 致 @vxunderground：想像一下，您一覺醒來，為幫助 Jimmy JumboToes 從他的電腦中刪除惡意軟體而感到興奮。諷刺的是，你只需發送連結到 MalwareBytes、CCleaner，並在整個過程中握住他們的手。然後，一旦完成，你決定再做一次，而且是免費的。他媽的精神分裂

posts.name: vxunderground
posts.text: I found some dork online who talks about being a malware enthusiast, or something. He dedicates basically every second of his free time to helping people remove malware from their computers for free. He provides step-by-step instructions on how to install an anti-virus and provides useful links to software tool suites that can help clean your computer Y'know, God bless him, but that seems like such a terminally bleak existence. If you told me this man was Jesus Christ in the flesh, I might believe you. I've never met someone who does Helpdesk support for the love of the game.
posts.text_zh: 我在網路上發現了一些傻瓜，他們談論自己是惡意軟體愛好者之類的。他基本上把每一秒鐘的空閒時間都用來幫助人們免費從電腦中刪除惡意軟體。他提供瞭如何安裝防毒軟體的逐步說明，並提供了可以幫助清理電腦的軟體工具套件的有用連結。你知道，上帝保佑他，但這似乎是一個極其黯淡的存在。如果你告訴我這個人是肉身的耶穌基督，我可能會相信你。我從來沒有遇過因為熱愛遊戲而提供幫助台支援的人。

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 💧 How Much Water Does AI Really Use? A widely shared estimate claims that generating a 100-word GPT-4 email can require roughly 500 mL of water when data-center cooling and electricity generation are included. * The estimate is model- and location-dependent, not a fixed cost for every prompt. * Researchers project global AI workloads could withdraw 4.2–6.6 billion m³ of water annually by 2027. * Water withdrawal is not the same as permanent water consumption. * AI companies still disclose limited standardized data on per-query water use. Analyst Note: AI’s water footprint is real, but viral “one prompt equals one bottle” claims often remove the assumptions behind the calculation. The larger issue is the rapid expansion of data centers in water-stressed regions and the lack of comparable environmental reporting. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #AI
posts.text_zh: 💧 AI 到底用了多少水？一項廣泛共識的估計稱，如果包括資料中心冷卻和發電，產生一封 100 字的 GPT-4 電子郵件可能需要大約 500 毫升的水。 * 估算取決於型號和位置，而不是每個提示的固定成本。 * 研究人員預計，到 2027 年，全球人工智慧工作負載每年可取水 4.2-66 億立方公尺。 * 取水量與永久用水量不同。 * 人工智慧公司仍然披露有關每次查詢用水量的有限標準化資料。分析師註：人工智慧的水足跡是真的，但病毒式的「一次提示等於一瓶」的說法往往會消除計算背後的假設。更大的問題是缺水地區資料中心的快速擴張以及缺乏可比較的環境報告。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #AI

If legitimate, the combination of customer identity and transaction data could support vehicle-sale scams, payment fraud, impersonation and highly targeted phishing. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #GiveMeTheVIN

posts.text: 🇺🇸 United States - http://GiveMeTheVIN.com Data Breach Exposes Customer and Vehicle Data http://GiveMeTheVIN.com, a United States-based online platform specializing in purchasing vehicles nationwide, has allegedly been compromised, with its database exposed on an underground forum. The service facilitates the sale of used cars, requiring users to submit vehicle information, including VINs, and personal details to receive cash offers. The allegedly compromised data includes: * Customer names * Addresses * Phone numbers * Email addresses * Vehicle Identification Numbers (VINs) * Vehicle details * Driver's license information * Financial payment information

posts.text: 🇩🇪 German E-Commerce Database Allegedly Offered for Sale A threat actor is advertising what they claim is a database belonging to http://baumschule-nielsen.de, a German online plant and nursery retailer. According to the listing: * Claimed volume: approximately 60,000 records * Dataset allegedly includes customer, address, and order information * Visible sample fields include names, company details, email addresses, phone numbers, password-related fields, VAT IDs, registration status, login activity, birthdays, order counts, order totals, and account metadata * The seller is offering the database through a cybercrime forum and accepts a middleman for the transaction Analyst Note: The authenticity, freshness, and source of the dataset have not been independently verified. If legitimate, the information could enable phishing, credential attacks, account takeover attempts, and order-related fraud targeting customers. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Germany

If authentic, the combination of exposed PII, legal documents, and account-control weaknesses could create significant risks of identity theft, extortion, impersonation, and targeted legal-themed phishing. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #France

posts.text: 🚨Betrial runner and billing data allegedly leaked A forum actor claims to have released a partial database tied to Betrial, an online platform used by trail-running enthusiasts to discover races, track results, compare rankings, and monitor performance. The listing references 2,831,633 runners across multiple countries, including 954,013 records from France, 135,988 from Belgium, and 80,632 from Spain. The files reportedly total 537MB in JSON and JSONL formats. The advertised data includes runner IDs, names, aliases, genders, ages, postal codes, cities, countries, and account creation dates. Additional files allegedly contain around 1,500 Stripe invoice records and 241 linked user-account records, including names, email addresses, subscription and payment details, account metadata, roles, and runner identifiers. This claim is currently unverified. 💥 Get early visibility into underground claims, including unblurred screenshots, before they turn into headlines: http://darkwebinformer.com/pricing

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🚨 AI-Assisted Research Uncovers 15-Year-Old Linux Kernel Flaw Researchers have disclosed GhostLock, tracked as CVE-2026-43499, a Linux kernel vulnerability introduced around 2011. Allows a locally authenticated, unprivileged user to gain root access May enable container escape and compromise the underlying host Affects multiple major Linux distributions using the vulnerable kernel code Discovered by Nebula Security’s AI-powered vulnerability research system The vulnerability exists in the kernel’s futex locking subsystem and has been assigned a CVSS score of 7.8. Organizations should install vendor-issued kernel updates, prioritizing multi-tenant servers, CI runners and systems that execute untrusted code. (The Hacker News) Analyst Note: GhostLock demonstrates how AI-assisted security research can identify subtle vulnerabilities that remained undetected through years of conventional review. The same capability will inevitably accelerate vulnerability discovery for both defenders and attackers. #DDW #Intelligence #Linux #CyberSecurity
posts.text_zh: 🚨 人工智慧輔助研究發現了已有 15 年之久的 Linux 核心缺陷 研究人員披露了 GhostLock，追蹤編號為 CVE-2026-43499，這是 2011 年左右引入的一個 Linux 核心漏洞。 允許本地經過驗證的非特權用戶獲得 root 存取權限 可能導致容器逃逸並危及底層主機 使用易受攻擊的核心程式碼影響多個主要 Linux 發行版 由 Nebula Security 的人工智慧漏洞研究系統發現該漏洞存在於核心的 futex 鎖定子系統中，CVSS 評分為 7.8。組織應安裝供應商發布的核心更新，優先考慮多租戶伺服器、CI 運行程序和執行不受信任代碼的系統。 （《駭客新聞》）分析師註釋：GhostLock 展示了人工智慧輔助安全研究如何識別經過多年傳統審查仍未發現的微妙漏洞。相同的功能將不可避免地加速防禦者和攻擊者的漏洞發現速度。 #DDW #Intelligence #Linux #Cyber​​Security

posts.name: MonThreat
posts.text: 🚨 Threat Actor Claims 23.5 TB Breach of Brazilian Health Tech Firm Mobilemed A ransomware threat actor has allegedly breached Mobilemed, a Brazil-based health technology company specializing in cloud-based Picture Archiving and Communication Systems (PACS). According to a post on an underground forum, the attacker claims to have exfiltrated 23.5 TB of data comprising over 52 million files from the organization's infrastructure. The post alleges that the stolen data includes sensitive patient information and internal credentials. The actor claims the dump contains: * 35 million records of patient Personally Identifiable Information (PII) * 17,176,370 personal files * 67,493 account PII records Mobilemed provides critical imaging infrastructure for radiologists, hospitals, and diagnostic centers in Brazil. The exposure of such a large volume of medical data could have severe implications for patient privacy and regulatory compliance under Brazil’s General Data Protection Law (LGPD). The threat actor demands a ransom of $1,500,000, setting a deadline of August 1, 2026. The post warns that if the payment is not made, the group intends to publish the full dataset or sell it on the dark web. At the time of reporting, the alleged breach has not been independently verified by Mobilemed or third-party security researchers. #DataBreach #Ransomware #Mobilemed #HealthcareSecurity #Brazil #DarkWeb #ThreatIntelligence
posts.text_zh: 🚨 威脅行為者聲稱巴西健康科技公司 Mobilemed 遭受了 23.5 TB 的攻擊 據稱，一名勒索軟體威脅行為者入侵了 Mobilemed，這是一家總部位於巴西的健康科技公司，專門從事基於雲端的圖片存檔和通訊系統 (PACS)。根據地下論壇上的一篇帖子，攻擊者聲稱已從該組織的基礎設施中竊取了 23.5 TB 數據，其中包括超過 5200 萬個文件。該貼文聲稱被盜資料包括敏感的病患資訊和內部憑證。該演員聲稱轉儲包含： * 3500 萬筆病患個人識別資訊 (PII) 記錄 * 17,176,370 個個人文件 * 67,493 個帳戶 PII 記錄 Mobilemed 為巴西的放射科醫生、醫院和診斷中心提供關鍵的影像基礎設施。如此大量的醫療資料的暴露可能會對病患隱私和巴西通用資料保護法 (LGPD) 的監管合規性產生嚴重影響。該威脅行為者要求支付 1,500,000 美元的贖金，截止日期為 2026 年 8 月 1 日。該貼文警告說，如果不付款，該組織打算發布完整資料集或在暗網上出售。截至本報告發布之時，Mobilemed 或第三方安全研究人員尚未對所指控的違規行為進行獨立核實。 #DataBreach #Ransomware #Mobilemed #HealthcareSecurity #Brazil #DarkWeb #ThreatIntelligence

posts.name: MonThreat
posts.text: ⚠️ Threat Actor Claims Sale of 15M Records from Rock N' Cash Casino A threat actor is allegedly offering full access to the game server and a database containing over 15 million records from the mobile casino application Rock N' Cash. According to a listing on an underground forum, the seller claims to possess 7 gigabytes of SQL data extracted from the service. The post alleges that the compromised application has been downloaded more than 10 million times on Google Play and is also available on the Apple App Store. The actor claims to have obtained "full access" to the game server alongside the complete user database. The exposed data reportedly includes: * 15 million lines of SQL data * Full administrative access to the game server Rock N' Cash is a popular social casino app developed by Playtika, one of the world's largest online gaming companies. If authentic, the exposure of such a large volume of user data could facilitate targeted phishing campaigns or identity theft against millions of players. At the time of reporting, the alleged breach has not been independently verified.
posts.text_zh: ⚠️ 威脅行為者聲稱出售 Rock N' Cash Casino 的 1500 萬筆記錄 據稱，威脅行為者提供了對遊戲伺服器和包含來自行動賭場應用程式 Rock N' Cash 的超過 1500 萬筆記錄的資料庫的完全存取權。根據地下論壇上的列表，賣家聲稱擁有從該服務中提取的 7 GB SQL 資料。該貼文稱，受感染的應用程式在 Google Play 上的下載量已超過 1000 萬次，並且還可以在 Apple App Store 上找到。該演員聲稱已獲得遊戲伺服器以及完整用戶資料庫的「完全存取權」。據報導，暴露的數據包括： * 1500 萬行 SQL 數據 * 對遊戲伺服器的完全管理訪問 Rock N' Cash 是一款流行的社交賭場應用程序，由全球最大的在線遊戲公司之一 Playtika 開發。如果是真實的，如此大量的用戶資料的暴露可能會促進針對數百萬玩家的有針對性的網路釣魚活動或身份盜竊。截至本報告發布之時，所指控的違規行為尚未得到獨立核實。

posts.name: MonThreat
posts.text: 🚨 Alleged Indian Army Air Defence Data Leak on Underground Forum A post on an underground forum claims to expose data belonging to the Indian Army's Air Defence sector. The listing, authored by a user named 'slepra' on July 10, 2026, is titled 'Army Air Defence India Data,' suggesting the unauthorized disclosure of military-related information. The source material does not provide specific details regarding the volume of data, the types of records exposed, or the method of acquisition. No screenshots, file names, or sample data were included in the thread to substantiate the claim. The Indian Army is one of the largest standing armies in the world, and its air defence systems are critical to national security infrastructure. If authentic, the exposure of such data could pose significant risks to national defense operations and strategic planning. At the time of reporting, the alleged breach has not been independently verified, and no official statement has been issued by the Indian Ministry of Defence or related authorities.
posts.text_zh: 🚨 地下論壇涉嫌印度陸軍防空資料外洩 地下論壇上的一篇貼文聲稱洩漏了屬於印度陸軍防空部門的資料。該清單由名為“slepra”的用戶於 2026 年 7 月 10 日撰寫，標題為“印度陸軍防空數據”，暗示未經授權披露軍事相關資訊。來源材料沒有提供有關資料量、公開記錄類型或取得方法的具體細節。線程中沒有包含任何螢幕截圖、文件名或範例數據來證實這一說法。印度陸軍是世界上最大的常備軍之一，其防空系統對國家安全基礎設施至關重要。如果屬實，此類數據的暴露可能會對國防行動和戰略規劃構成重大風險。截至發稿時，所指控的違規行為尚未獨立核實，印度國防部或相關當局也未發表正式聲明。
